generatedSentence: In the vast sprawl of the steampunk city, the old keepers clung to their traditions with fierce loyalty. A young dude, an orphaned tinkerer, possessed a singular thought: to build something new. His pet echidna and a mechanical cricket observed as he playfully adjusted a porous circuit board. His device, still in its newborn stages, was designed to taunt the city's bureaucracy, hoping to become an icon for a generation. Suddenly, the sky thunders, mirroring the city's growing pessimism. A cryptic telegram arrived, detailing escalating killings and a brazen carjack. An elongated figure, 'The Nighthawk,' and his associate, the notorious Drake, were behind the chaos, leaving the police in a daze. The citizens began to kvetch incessantly. Our dude saw the news on his dashboard screen, feeling a chill worse than influenza. He knew he had to act, a neutron of courage sparking within him, feeling the city had been knocked out, needing a dose of lidocaine. The dude, with a desperate hop, used a grappling hawser to board Drake's carina-shaped vessel as it began to overfly the central orbital power core. He needed to dispel its crystalline force field. Inside, a bizarre, eccentric creature resembling an olm guarded their stolen dowry. The fight became a dizzying parody of aerial combat, with the dude's device emitting a powerful illumination to counter their overrated tech. He fought for a safer city, determined to heal its wounds. With Drake defeated, a sense of symmetry returned to the city. The once itchy feeling of dread subsided, replaced by a supportive community. Even the gruff truckers shared warm naan bread and coffee. The dude, now a local hero, watched a baby calf graze peacefully under a blooming lotus tree, a single leaf falling nearby. He saw an iguana sunning itself on the eaves of a building. People exchanged positive hashtags and shared keywords of hope. His triumph would forever entertain the generations to come. He imagined cooking a celebratory hake for dinner, a perfect end to the day, noticing the vibrant new lipstick worn by passersby.
panelSentences: In the vast sprawl of the steampunk city, the old keepers clung to their traditions with fierce loyalty. A young dude, an orphaned tinkerer, possessed a singular thought: to build something new. His pet echidna and a mechanical cricket observed as he playfully adjusted a porous circuit board. His device, still in its newborn stages, was designed to taunt the city's bureaucracy, hoping to become an icon for a generation.

Suddenly, the sky thunders, mirroring the city's growing pessimism. A cryptic telegram arrived, detailing escalating killings and a brazen carjack. An elongated figure, 'The Nighthawk,' and his associate, the notorious Drake, were behind the chaos, leaving the police in a daze. The citizens began to kvetch incessantly. Our dude saw the news on his dashboard screen, feeling a chill worse than influenza. He knew he had to act, a neutron of courage sparking within him, feeling the city had been knocked out, needing a dose of lidocaine.

The dude, with a desperate hop, used a grappling hawser to board Drake's carina-shaped vessel as it began to overfly the central orbital power core. He needed to dispel its crystalline force field. Inside, a bizarre, eccentric creature resembling an olm guarded their stolen dowry. The fight became a dizzying parody of aerial combat, with the dude's device emitting a powerful illumination to counter their overrated tech. He fought for a safer city, determined to heal its wounds.

With Drake defeated, a sense of symmetry returned to the city. The once itchy feeling of dread subsided, replaced by a supportive community. Even the gruff truckers shared warm naan bread and coffee. The dude, now a local hero, watched a baby calf graze peacefully under a blooming lotus tree, a single leaf falling nearby. He saw an iguana sunning itself on the eaves of a building. People exchanged positive hashtags and shared keywords of hope. His triumph would forever entertain the generations to come. He imagined cooking a celebratory hake for dinner, a perfect end to the day, noticing the vibrant new lipstick worn by passersby.
rawPanelSentences: In the vast **sprawl** of the **steampunk** city, the old **keepers** clung to their traditions with fierce **loyalty**. A young **dude**, an **orphaned** tinkerer, possessed a singular **thought**: to build something **new**. His pet **echidna** and a mechanical **cricket** observed as he **playfully** adjusted a **porous** circuit board. His device, still in its **newborn** stages, was designed to **taunt** the city's bureaucracy, hoping to become an **icon** for a generation.

Suddenly, the sky **thunders**, mirroring the city's growing **pessimism**. A cryptic **telegram** arrived, detailing escalating **killings** and a brazen **carjack**. An **elongated** figure, 'The **Nighthawk**,' and his associate, the notorious **Drake**, were behind the chaos, leaving the **police** in a daze. The citizens began to **kvetch** incessantly. Our **dude** saw the news on his **dashboard** screen, feeling a chill worse than **influenza**. He knew he had to act, a **neutron** of courage sparking within him, feeling the city had been **knocked** out, needing a dose of **lidocaine**.

The **dude**, with a desperate **hop**, used a grappling **hawser** to board **Drake**'s **carina**-shaped vessel as it began to **overfly** the central **orbital** power core. He needed to **dispel** its **crystalline** force field. Inside, a bizarre, **eccentric** creature resembling an **olm** guarded their stolen **dowry**. The fight became a dizzying **parody** of aerial combat, with the **dude**'s device emitting a powerful **illumination** to counter their **overrated** tech. He fought for a **safer** city, determined to **heal** its wounds.

With **Drake** defeated, a sense of **symmetry** returned to the city. The once **itchy** feeling of dread subsided, replaced by a **supportive** community. Even the gruff **truckers** shared warm **naan** bread and coffee. The **dude**, now a local hero, watched a baby **calf** graze peacefully under a blooming **lotus** tree, a single **leaf** falling nearby. He saw an **iguana** sunning itself on the **eaves** of a building. People exchanged positive **hashtag**s and shared **keywords** of hope. His triumph would forever **entertain** the generations to come. He imagined cooking a celebratory **hake** for dinner, a perfect end to the day, noticing the vibrant new **lipstick** worn by passersby.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, dynamic action comic style, thick white gutters, clean black borders. A young inventor, wearing a tattered brown leather flight jacket, steampunk goggles, and carrying a glowing blue energy device. TOP-LEFT PANEL: Young inventor intently working on a complex device, echidna and mechanical cricket nearby, medium shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: Inventor looking worriedly at a futuristic dashboard screen displaying 'NIGHTHAWK' headline, stormy city visible through window, wide shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: Inventor swinging on a hawser towards a carina-shaped airship, activating his glowing device, dynamic low-angle shot. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: Inventor standing on a rooftop overlooking a peaceful steampunk city, a baby calf grazing and an iguana on the eaves, serene long shot. cel-shading, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting. NO text, NO speech bubbles, NO dialogue.

definitions.definition: A scornful or mocking remark; a jeer or mockery
To make fun of (someone); to goad (a person) into responding, often in an aggressive manner.
The loud rumbling, cracking, or crashing sound caused by expansion of rapidly heated air around a lightning bolt.
definitions.example: Thunder is preceded by lightning.

definitions.definition: A deep, rumbling noise resembling thunder.
definitions.example: Off in the distance, he heard the thunder of hoofbeats, signalling a stampede.

definitions.definition: An alarming or startling threat or denunciation.
The discharge of electricity; a thunderbolt.
The spotlight.
definitions.example: Shortly after I announced my pregnancy, he stole my thunder with his news of landing his dream job.

definitions.definition: To produce thunder; to sound, rattle, or roar, as a discharge of atmospheric electricity; often used impersonally.
definitions.example: It thundered continuously.

definitions.definition: To make a noise like thunder.
definitions.example: The train thundered along the tracks.

definitions.definition: To talk with a loud, threatening voice.
To say (something) with a loud, threatening voice.
definitions.example: "Get back to work at once!", he thundered.

definitions.definition: To produce something with incredible power
To ponder, to go over in one's head.
definitions.example: Idly, the detective thought what his next move should be.

definitions.definition: To communicate to oneself in one's mind, to try to find a solution to a problem.
definitions.example: I thought for three hours about the problem and still couldn’t find the solution.

definitions.definition: To conceive of something or someone (usually followed by of; infrequently, by on).
definitions.example: I tend to think of her as rather ugly.

definitions.definition: To be of opinion (that); to consider, judge, regard, or look upon (something) as.
definitions.example: At the time I thought his adamant refusal to give in right.

definitions.definition: To guess; to reckon.
definitions.example: I think she’ll pass the examination.

definitions.definition: To plan; to be considering; to be of a mind (to do something).
To presume; to venture.
To seem, to appear.
Form created in the mind, rather than the forms perceived through the five senses; an instance of thinking.
definitions.example: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.

definitions.definition: The operation by which such forms arise or are manipulated; the process of thinking; the agency by which thinking is accomplished.
definitions.example: Without freedom of thought there can be no such thing as wisdom, and no such thing as public liberty without freedom of speech.

definitions.definition: A way of thinking (associated with a group, nation or region).
definitions.example: Traditional eastern thought differs markedly from that of the west.

definitions.definition: One who has done something offensive; a deceitful, dishonest, or disreputable person; a deceiver; a cheat.
A rogue; rascal; miscreant; a ne'er-do-well.
One who drives a truck, especially as an occupation.
One who trucks or trafficks, by trade of goods; a trafficker.
definitions.example: No man having ever yet driven a saving bargain with this great trucker for souls. — South.

definitions.definition: A message transmitted by telegraph.
To send a telegram.
To send a telegram to (a person).
To send (a message) in a telegram.
A general belief that bad things will happen.
The doctrine that this world is the worst of all possible worlds.
The condition of being pessimal.
Full of tiny pores that allow fluids or gasses to pass through.
definitions.example: Concrete is porous, so water will slowly filter through it.

definitions.definition: With many gaps.
(by extension) full of loopholes
In a playful manner.
A work or performance that imitates another work or performance with ridicule or irony.
A popular maxim, adage, or proverb.
To make a parody of something.
definitions.example: The comedy movie parodied the entire Western genre.

definitions.definition: A civil force granted the legal authority for law enforcement and maintaining public order.

definitions.definition: A police officer.
People who seek to enforce norms or standards.

definitions.definition: The duty of cleaning up.
Policy.
Communal living; civilization.
The regulation of a given community or society; administration, law and order etc.
To enforce the law and keep order among (a group).
definitions.example: Extra security was hired to police the crowd at the big game.

definitions.definition: To clean up an area.
To enforce norms or standards upon.
definitions.example: to police a person's identity

definitions.definition: A person who endlessly whines or complains; a person who finds fault with anything.
An instance of kvetching; a complaint or whine.
To whine or complain, often needlessly and incessantly.
An instance of someone being killed.
(usually as make a killing) A large amount of money.

definitions.definition: To strike for admittance; to rap upon, as a door.
To criticize verbally; to denigrate; to undervalue.

definitions.definition: To kick a ball towards another player; to pass.

definitions.definition: A person or thing worth keeping.

definitions.definition: Current or later, as opposed to former.
definitions.example: My new car is much better than my previous one, even though it is older.   We had been in our new house for five years by then.

definitions.definition: Used to distinguish something established more recently, named after something or some place previously existing.

definitions.definition: Refreshed, reinvigorated, reformed.
definitions.example: That shirt is dirty. Go and put on a new one.   I feel like a new person after a good night's sleep.   After the accident, I saw the world with new eyes.

definitions.definition: Newborn.

definitions.definition: Of recent origin; having taken place recently.
definitions.example: I can't see you for a while; the pain is still too new.   Did you see the new King Lear at the theatre?

definitions.definition: Strange, unfamiliar or not previously known.
definitions.example: The idea was new to me.   I need to meet new people.

definitions.definition: Recently arrived or appeared.
definitions.example: Have you met the new guy in town?   He is the new kid at school.

definitions.definition: Inexperienced or unaccustomed at some task.
definitions.example: Don't worry that you're new at this job; you'll get better with time.   I'm new at this business.

definitions.definition: (of a period of time) Next; about to begin or recently begun.
definitions.example: We expect to grow at 10% annually in the new decade.

definitions.definition: Newly (especially in composition).

definitions.definition: As new; from scratch.

definitions.definition: Having a different center; not concentric.

(of a motion) Against or in the opposite direction of contraction of a muscle (e.g., such as results from flexion of the lower arm (bending of the elbow joint) by an external force while contracting the triceps and other elbow extensor muscles to control that movement; opening of the jaw while flexing the masseter).

To esteem too highly; to give greater praise than due.
Given an undue amount of credit for quality or merit in a field; not necessarily related to popularity.

An orbital motorway.
Of or relating to an orbit.
Of or relating to the eye socket (eyehole).
(roads, railways) passing around the outside of a certain area.

To deprive of parents (used almost exclusively in the passive)
definitions.example: What do you do when you come across two orphaned polar bear cubs?

definitions.definition: To make unavailable, as by removing the last remaining pointer or reference to.
definitions.example: Removing categories orphans pages from the main category tree.

definitions.definition: Abandoned.
definitions.example: I found an orphaned project, half-completed before its author quit, and decided to finish it.
